description: Nearby allies take reduced damage from projectiles.
tooltipTemplate: Allies within {radiusPixels} of this Cleric take {damageReductionPercent%} less projectile damage.

description: Heal also grants temporary attack speed to every target.
tooltipTemplate: Healed allies gain +{attackSpeedMultiplier%} attack speed for {buffDurationSeconds:1}s. Recasts on the focus target when the buff is below {recastThresholdPercent%} of full duration.

description: Heal also grants temporary armor to every target.
tooltipTemplate: Healed allies gain +{armorBonus:0} armor for {buffDurationSeconds:1}s. Recasts on the focus target when the buff is below {recastThresholdPercent%} of full duration.
Regenerate an additional {bonusManaRegen:1} mana per second.
